code:
import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Bool
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(b)
    b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13 or b == 10
  when None
    false
  end
end

fn process(_ line: String) -> Unit
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  mut out = ""
  mut has_prev = false
  mut prev = 0
  while i < n
    while i < n and is_ws(line, i)
      i = i + 1
    end
    if i < n
      let start = i
      while i < n and not is_ws(line, i)
        i = i + 1
      end
      let tok = string.substring(line, start, i)
      match string.parse_int(tok)
      when Some(v)
        if not has_prev
          out = "#{v}"
          prev = v
          has_prev = true
        else if v != prev
          out = "#{out} #{v}"
          prev = v
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
    end
  end
  println(out)
end

match io.read_line()
when Some(line)
  process(line)
when None
  println("")
end
